tasks.title: Install Clerk SDK and configure env vars
tasks.description: Install @clerk/nextjs. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, CLERK_SECRET_KEY, and redirect URL env vars to .env.local. Remove @supabase/ssr dependency.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: @clerk/nextjs is installed and in package.json
AC-2: @supabase/ssr is removed from package.json
AC-3: Clerk env vars added to .env.local.example
GATE: npm install completes without errors

tasks.title: Refactor Supabase clients to DB-only
tasks.description: Rewrite src/lib/supabase/server.ts to use plain createClient with service-role key (no cookies). Rewrite src/lib/supabase/client.ts to use plain createClient with anon key. Delete src/lib/supabase/proxy.ts. Keep service.ts unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: server.ts uses createClient from @supabase/supabase-js with service-role key
AC-2: client.ts uses createClient from @supabase/supabase-js with anon key
AC-3: proxy.ts is deleted
AC-4: No imports from @supabase/ssr remain in codebase
GATE: tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Add ClerkProvider and create auth helper
tasks.description: Wrap app in ClerkProvider in src/app/layout.tsx. Create src/lib/auth.ts with getAuthUserId() helper that wraps Clerk's auth().
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Root layout wraps children with <ClerkProvider>
AC-2: src/lib/auth.ts exports getAuthUserId() returning string | null
GATE: tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Rewrite middleware with clerkMiddleware
tasks.description: Replace src/proxy.ts to use clerkMiddleware from @clerk/nextjs/server. Define public routes (login, map, builders, hackathons, API reads, cron). Protect all other routes. Keep redirect from / to /map.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: proxy.ts exports named proxy function using clerkMiddleware
AC-2: Public routes (/map, /builders, /hackathons, /login) don't require auth
AC-3: Protected routes (/saved, /lfg, /profile, /admin) require auth
AC-4: Root path / redirects to /map
GATE: npm run build passes

tasks.title: Replace login page with Clerk SignIn component
tasks.description: Rewrite src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx to render Clerk's <SignIn> component with dark theme appearance. Delete src/app/api/auth/callback/route.ts (Clerk handles callbacks internally).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Login page renders <SignIn> with dark theme styling
AC-2: OAuth callback route is deleted
AC-3: No references to supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth remain
GATE: npm run build passes

tasks.title: Simplify onboarding to 1 step and add new-user detection
tasks.description: Rewrite src/app/(auth)/onboarding/page.tsx to a single form (username + location). Use Clerk's useUser() for user data. Update src/app/(main)/layout.tsx to detect new users (no profile/username) and redirect to /onboarding.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Onboarding shows single form with username (required) and location (optional with geolocation)
AC-2: Display name pre-filled from Clerk user.fullName, avatar from user.imageUrl
AC-3: Profile created in Supabase with Clerk user ID as PK
AC-4: Main layout redirects to /onboarding if user has no username
GATE: npm run build passes

tasks.title: Migrate server components and API routes to Clerk auth
tasks.description: Replace supabase.auth.getUser() with getAuthUserId() in 7 files: page.tsx (root), (main)/layout.tsx, saved/page.tsx, lfg/page.tsx, admin/page.tsx, admin/hackathons/page.tsx, api/lfg/route.ts. Update DB queries to use createServerClient().
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: All 7 files use getAuthUserId() instead of supabase.auth.getUser()
AC-2: All DB queries use createServerClient() (DB-only)
AC-3: Auth guards redirect to /login when userId is null
AC-4: Admin pages still check profile.is_admin
GATE: grep -r 'supabase.auth.getUser' src/app returns 0 results

tasks.title: Migrate client components to Clerk hooks
tasks.description: Replace supabase.auth.getUser() with useAuth()/useUser()/useClerk() in 5 files: nav-bar.tsx (signOut), profile/page.tsx, lfg/new/page.tsx, hackathon-actions.tsx, builder-actions.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: nav-bar.tsx uses useClerk().signOut() for logout
AC-2: All 5 files use Clerk hooks instead of supabase.auth.getUser()
AC-3: userId is obtained from useAuth() in all components
GATE: grep -r 'supabase.auth' src/components src/app returns 0 results

tasks.title: Database schema migration (UUID to TEXT)
tasks.description: Create and run SQL migration against Supabase: drop profiles FK to auth.users, ALTER all ID columns from UUID to TEXT (profiles, saved_items, hackathon_interests, lfg_posts, notifications, hackathons), drop handle_new_user trigger, disable RLS on all tables.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: profiles.id column is TEXT type
AC-2: All FK columns (user_id, author_id, created_by) are TEXT type
AC-3: handle_new_user trigger is dropped
AC-4: RLS is disabled on all 6 tables
GATE: SQL migration runs without errors

tasks.title: End-to-end smoke test and cleanup
tasks.description: Verify full auth flow works: new user login → onboarding → map, returning user → map, sign out, protected routes, admin access. Verify zero remaining supabase.auth references. Update .env.local.example.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: npm run build completes with zero errors
AC-2: grep -r 'supabase.auth' src/ returns 0 results
AC-3: grep -r '@supabase/ssr' src/ returns 0 results
AC-4: .env.local.example includes Clerk vars
GATE: Full build + no supabase.auth references
